sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἀρεοπαγίτης

- Transliteration: Areopagites

- Phonetic: ar-eh-op-ag-ee'-tace

- Definition:

1. a member of the court of Areopagus, an Areopagite

- Origin: from G697

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: From G697; an Areopagite or member of the court held on Mars´ Hill: - Areopagite.
